### useStyleSheetOnce()

useStyleSheetOnce 全局插入一次 css 样式，适用于静态样式场景

```typescript
export declare function useStyleSheetOnce(styles: string, { disabled, atLeastOne }?: {
    disabled?: boolean;
    atLeastOne?: boolean;
}): void;
```

#### useStyleSheetOnce的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  styles | string |  |
|  { disabled, atLeastOne } | { disabled?: boolean; atLeastOne?: boolean; } |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

void
